'''Xobome 6''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located within the [[Xobome system/Legends|Xobome system]] of the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]], between [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]] and [[Doldrums]]. Its high plains were blasted by freezing winds. [[Wraith Squadron]] captured the [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']] over Xobome 6.

{{Planet-stub}}
